originalDescription: Add AI agent capability with Claude Agent SDK (@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk). Create a new package apps/agent or packages/agent with tool definitions and conversation management. Define at least one working agent (e.g., a content analysis agent). Wire up with existing MCP server infrastructure in apps/mcp-servers/. Document usage in docs/.
